title: Incorrect simulation result due to some optimizations

features.name: part_select_as_ternary_condition
features.description: Code should include a 1-bit part-select from a signed vector used as the condition in a ternary operator

features.name: ternary_with_reduction_and_shift
features.description: Code should include a ternary operator with a reduction operator followed by a right shift in the false branch
features.snippet:
reg in0;
assign wire_0 = in4[0:0] ? expr_true : (!(in0) >> 9'b1111);

features.name: ternary_with_concatenation_replication
features.description: Code should include a ternary operator with concatenation using replication in the true branch

features.name: part_select_nonzero_width_on_signed
features.description: Code should include a part-select with non-zero width (e.g., [0:0]) on a signed reg used in conditional context
